functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher records a grade for a student in a course. Validates student existence, course existence, score range (0-100), and prevents duplicate records. Creates a new grade record.

functional_requirements.title: Update Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher updates an existing grade record. Validates grade record existence and updates score and recorded_at timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher deletes a grade record. Validates grade record existence and removes it.

functional_requirements.title: Get Student Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a student. Calculate average score, total credits, and GPA. Display each course grade with letter grade.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a course. Calculate course average, max, min, and distribution of letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: List Grades by Class
functional_requirements.description: List grades for a specific class, optionally filtered by course. Calculate class average and rank students by score.

functional_requirements.title: Get Grade Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate a textual grade report for a student containing all course grades, average, GPA, and credit summary.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Statistics
functional_requirements.description: Provide statistical data for a course: average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade percentage distribution.

functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student to the system. Validate that student_id is unique.

functional_requirements.title: Add Course
functional_requirements.description: Add a new course to the system. Validate that course_id is unique.

acceptance_criteria.description: Record grade: duplicate grade for same student and course should be rejected with appropriate message.
Record grade: score out of range (0-100) should be rejected.
Update grade: non-existent grade_id should be rejected.
Get student grades: GPA calculation should use weighted formula (grade point * credit) / total credits.
Get student grades: letter grade conversion should be correct (A: 90-100, B:80-89, C:70-79, D:60-69, F:<60).
Get course statistics: standard deviation and pass rate calculations must be accurate.
List grades by class: ranking should be in descending order of score.
Add student: student_id must be unique.
Add course: course_id must be unique.
Grade report should contain student info, each course grade with letter, average, GPA, and total credits.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: students, courses, grades.

glossary.GPA: Grade Point Average, weighted calculation: sum(grade_point * credits) / sum(credits). Grade points: A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0.
glossary.Credit: Weight of a course, used in GPA calculation.
glossary.manage_grade: Single entry point function accepting command and grade_data, returning JSON output.

global_state_sources.description: Stores student information with fields: student_id, name, class, enrollment_year. Pre-populated with 10 test students.
Stores course information with fields: course_id, name, credit, teacher. Pre-populated with 4 test courses.
Stores grade records with fields: grade_id, student_id, course_id, score, recorded_at. Initially empty.

input_spec.description: Input is passed via the manage_grade(command, grade_data) function. command is a string, grade_data is a JSON object containing relevant fields.

schema.command: string (enum: record_grade, update_grade, delete_grade, get_student_grades, get_course_grades, list_class_grades, get_grade_report, get_course_stats, add_student, add_course)

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields. Data contains command-specific results.
